title: Portal manifest (v0.1.0)
description: The JSON document returned from GET /portal. Describes the service, its tools, and optional auth/pricing metadata.

portal_version.description: Semver-like version string. v0.1 accepts exactly '0.1'.

brief.description: Natural-language description for the visiting LLM. Should answer 'what can I do here?' in a sentence or two.

tools.description: List of tools callable at call_endpoint. Must contain at least one tool.

call_endpoint.description: Absolute HTTPS URL that accepts POST /portal/call-style requests.

auth.description: Auth model. 'erc8004' is a documented extension (PE-001); providers may advertise it but the base visitor SDK is not required to implement it.

model.description: 'x402' is a documented extension (PE-002) for per-call micropayments.

rate.description: Free-form rate description, e.g. '$0.001/call'. Required iff model != 'free'.

name.description: Unique within this manifest. Lowercase, underscores allowed.

params.description: Sugar form. Each entry is { type, required?, description? }. Compiles internally to JSON Schema.

paramsSchema.description: Escape hatch: a JSON Schema draft-07 object. Use when 'params' sugar isn't expressive enough. Mutually exclusive with 'params'.
